name: Square Back Accent Arm Chair Boucle Black - Threshold™: Upholstered Polyester, Rubberwood Legs
description:
Update your seating arrangement with this Square-Back Accent Chair from Threshold™. This square-back accent chair features padded seat and back cushions along with armrests to offer you a comfortable seating experience. The solid black upholstery blends seamlessly with a range of decor styles and color schemes, while the wood frame offers a solid base. You can place it in your living room, bedroom or any other space that needs extra seating.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
